name: Othar Thurston Alford
motto: "High-erected thoughts seated in the heart of courtesy."
clubs: awarded Porter Loving Cup for best all-around athlete, '21

name: Mildred McDowell
motto: "The ripest peach is highest on the tree."
clubs: Publicity Committee Y. W. C. A.

name: Emmet E. Bennett
motto: "An honest man's the noblest work of God."

name: Ora Daniel Bohannon
motto: "The hand that hath made you fair, hath made you good."
description: Graduate of Western Kentucky State Normal.

name: James W. Britton
motto: "If it be a gentleman and a scholar Ye seek, ye have found him."

name: Homer Alonzo Casey
motto: "Of manners gentle, of affections mild; In wit a man, simplicity a child."

name: Ralph D. Clark
motto: "They say, best men are moulded out of faults And, for the most, become much more the better For being a little bad."
clubs: President of Y. M. C. A., '23

name: Mary Virginia Carswell
motto: "Her eyes like stars of twilight fair; Like twilight's too her dusky hair."

name: Burnett C. Cowart
motto: "Ambition rules my brain, love my heart."
clubs: Philomathic Literary Society, Secretary, '21, Vice-President, '22, President, '22, '23

name: Clara de Shazo
motto: "Charms strike the sight, merit wins the soul."

name: A. M. Glover
motto: "Every man has his fault, and honesty is his."

name: Nallie Mae Casey
motto: "She is loved for her smile, her look, Her way of speaking gently."

name: Samuel L. Heath
motto: "They are never alone that are accompanied with noble thoughts."

name: Robert W. Herring
motto: "He followeth knowledge like a setting star."

name: Charles McKinley Hurst
motto: "Cheerful at morn, he wakes from short repose, Breasts the keen air, and carols as he goes."

name: Verna Connell
motto: "Light of heart and fancy free."

name: E. E. Johnson
motto: "Pure in heart, humble in spirit, he seeks knowledge and truth."
clubs: President College B. Y. P. U., '22

name: Clarence L. Kelly
motto: "A man who stands foursquare to all the winds that blow."

name: Fred Franklin Martin
motto: "The kindest man, The best conditioned and unwearied spirit In doing courtesies."
clubs: Corresponding Secretary Square and Compass Club, '22, '23

name: Jessie L. Freeman
motto: "In gentle looks and talents rare None can surpass and few compare."

name: Sapp, Dee
motto: "Merry as the day is long."
clubs: Membership Committee Y. W. C. A., '22, '23

name: Gillespie, J. P., Jr.
motto: "The true, strong, and sound mind is the mind that can embrace equally great things and small."
clubs: Franklin Literary Society, Secretary and Treasurer, '23
Winner Phi Kappa Nu Scholarship Medal, '22, '23

name: Anderson, Edward
motto: "Strongest minds are often those the noisy world hears least."

name: Lane, Helyn
motto: "For all that faire is, is by nature good; That is a signe to know the gentle blood."

name: Mildred Smith
motto: "Unblemished let me live, or die unknown; O grant an honest fame, or grant me none!"

name: J. C. Vaughn
motto: "The gentle mind by gentle deeds is known; For a man by nothing is so well betrayed as by his manners."

name: Herman D. Thomas
motto: "From the crown of his head to the sole of his foot, He is all mirth."

name: H. G. Wheeler
motto: "Nothing is impossible to the willing heart."

name: W. L. Williams
motto: "They govern most who make the least noise."

name: Mamie Carlene Wyatt
motto: "So well to know Her own, what she wills to do or say Seems wisest, virtuousest, discreetest, best."

name: Brady Justice
motto: "But he whose inborn worth his acts commend, Of gentle soul, to human race a friend."
clubs: President Baptist Student Missionary Movement of Alabama, '20, '21, '22

name: R. E. Lambert, Jr.
motto: "How sound his head and pure at heart."

name: Arthur King
motto: "The noblest mind the best contentment has."

name: William R. Copeland
motto: "Knowledge is power."
description: Supervisor in the Jefferson County Schools.

name: Mrs. W. M. Rockett
motto: "The world must have great minds, even as great spheres suns."
description: Teacher in the Jefferson County School System.

name: Harley F. Gilmore
motto: "Ability wins esteem of all true minds."

clubs: Secretary College B. Y. P. U.
